# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 Instance with EBS volumes for application data

Resources:
  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-XXXXX # replace with your desired AMI ID
      InstanceType: t2.micro # replace with your desired instance type
      KeyName: YourKeyPair # replace with the name of your key pair
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvdh
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 10
            VolumeType: gp2
    Metadata:
      AWS:
        EC2:
          NetworkInterface:
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Value: !Ref MyEC2Instance
    Description: The ID of the launched EC2 instance.
